# kemp_sub_virtual_service_rule (Data Source)

Looks up an existing content-switching rule attachment on a SubVS.

Useful for referencing rule attachments that were created outside Terraform (e.g., by the WUI). The SubVS is confirmed to exist; the LoadMaster API does not expose a way to verify that the named rule is actually attached, so this data source trusts the inputs.

Import an existing attachment into managed state with `kemp_sub_virtual_service_rule`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a rule attachment on a SubVS that was created outside Terraform.

data "kemp_sub_virtual_service_rule" "existing" {
  parent_virtual_service_id = "12"
  sub_virtual_service_id    = "15"
  rule                      = "match-api-path"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `parent_virtual_service_id` (String) `Index` of the parent virtual service.
- `rule` (String) Name of the rule that is attached.
- `sub_virtual_service_id` (String) `Index` of the SubVS the rule is attached to.
